titleStmt.title: SII 11.141: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 141. (B.K. No. 105 of 1929-30). MUTTIGI, BĀGEVĀḌI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB NEAR THE RUDRAGAṆṬI-RĀMALIṄGA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) who is stated to have then been ruling from his nelevīḍu at Jayantīpura. It records a gift of land and garden made by Tikeya Shaṇaṅgi to the god Tikēśvaradēva at Muttage, an uttamad-agrahāra, and the chief village in the kampaṇa of Muttage Thirty, a sub-division of Taddavāḍi Thousand.

The record is dated the year 21 of the king's reign, Īśvara, Pushya, śu. 5, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. Pushya śu. 5 fell on Friday, December 11, A.D. 1097, but the saṅkrānti occurred on Pushya ba. 3, Thursday, December 24, A.D. 1097.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© [©] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagaraṁraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ jayantīpurada nele
vīḍinoḷ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamira lippattoṁdaneya Īśvara saṁva
tsarada puṣya śuddha 5 bri Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti parbbanimittaṁ taddavāḍisāsirada
baḷiya kaṁpaṇa muttage mūvattaṟa modalabāḍa śrīmatsarbbanamaśyaduttamadagrahā
raṁ muttageya śrītikēśvaradēvargge Ā dātāraṁ tikeyaśaṇaṁgiyaruṁ baṁḍiya madhu vaṇaśaṇaṁ
giyara baḷiya keyi gāvuṁḍageṟeya teṁkaṇa mattarāṟumaṁ dēvariṁ mūḍa tōṁṭa mattaroṁdumaṁ
dhāregoṁḍūroḍeyapramukha maśīṣamahājanaṁgaḷge pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu sarbbana maśyamāge paḍe
du koṭṭarā keyaṁ tōṁṭakkaṁ piṁḍādānamāgi tiṟuva paṇaṁ paṇa nāluku 4 pavitrārōhaṇakke sūlige vo
kkalalu vīsa . Īdibyasthānamanā tikeyaṣaṇaṁgiyaru svasti yamaniyamasvā dhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannarappa paramanaiṣṭhikaru śrīdhrivē
śvarapaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ kaṟci dhārāpūrbbakaṁmāḍi koṭṭaṁ . © .
Digital edition of SII 11.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
